sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐγγίζω

- Transliteration: Eggizo

- Phonetic: eng-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to bring near, to join one thing to another

2. to draw or come near to, to approach

- Origin: from G1451

- TDNT entry: 07:30,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1451; to make near that is (reflexively) approach: - approach be at hand come (draw) near be (come draw) nigh.
